steps.title: Identify the blank's position and antecedent
steps.content: The blank fills a possessive slot before “impressive collection.” The antecedent—the noun being replaced—is “The Eiteljorg Museum,” which is singular and non-person.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content:
”Its” is the standard possessive form for singular, non-person antecedents (A). “Her” is for female persons, “their” is for plural, and “it's” is a contraction rather than a possessive.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
